footer.newsletterText: Occasional updates on selected identity work and seasonal availability.

home.heroTitle: A brand identity studio from Iraq.
home.heroSubtitle: We build considered visual systems for ambitious companies across the GCC.

homePage.title: Brand identity systems shaped for serious growth.
homePage.intro: We design editorial, digital, and visual identity systems for brands across Iraq and the GCC that need clarity, range, and long-term use.
homePage.proofLine: Selected by founders, agencies, and internal teams who need a quieter kind of authority.
homePage.closingTitle: If the next chapter needs more precision than noise, we should talk.
homePage.closingText: We take on a limited number of commissions each season, with a focus on identity systems built to travel across print, digital, and presentation contexts.
homePage.testimonialQuote: Hasan & Eman brought structure to a scattered brand and made it feel ready for serious growth.

workIndex.title: Projects
workIndex.intro: A considered selection of identity and digital work shaped for GCC brands, agencies, and cultural organisations.
workIndex.ctaTitle: Planning a new identity or a quieter refresh.
workIndex.ctaText: We take on a limited number of projects each season, with a focus on visual systems that need clarity, range, and long-term use.
